untranslatable_reason: Head and Shoulders Top pattern recognition requires multi-bar shoulder/head formation detection, horizontal consolidation patterns, and throwback validation. These are complex technical structures that cannot be expressed using single-bar indicators and basic operators. Pattern detection would require: (1) identifying left shoulder high, (2) identifying head high above left shoulder, (3) identifying right shoulder high below head, (4) neckline detection across multiple bars, and (5) multi-month consolidation detection. The allowed indicators cannot capture these multi-bar geometric relationships.
translation_notes: While the core pattern cannot be fully translated, a simplified SHORT entry rule has been provided using price action relative to moving averages and pivot points as a proxy for breakdown conditions. This captures the 'closes below support' aspect of a head-and-shoulders breakdown. The 83% success rate and 22% average decline from the source material suggest a strong reversal pattern, but proper implementation requires pattern recognition algorithms beyond the scope of these basic indicators. Manual visual confirmation of the H&S formation would be essential.
